Trump largohet vetem me votimi ne 2020,por me kete menyre se si po sillet e majta dhe establishmenti, ne 2018 republikanet do te zevendesohen me republikane pro Trump dhe pas 2024 perseri do te jete dikush qe eshte afer me Trump.
Koha e establishmentit mbaroi ne 2016,vec nese bejne grusht shteti dhe kerkojne te hapin lufte civile.

In April, Attorney General Jeff Sessions said that there are 10,000 MS-13 gang members in the United States. That number has been fairly constant for years, dating to at least 2006, even though more than 7,000 members of the gang have been arrested since fiscal year 2005 as part of “Operation Community Shield.”
